title: TumblingWindow
content:
# TumblingWindow

Inherits from: BaseTimeWindow


Non-overlapping time windows where hop_size equals window_size.


## Methods


### __init__(assets: List[str], inputs: List[str], queue: asyncio.Queue[AssetDataMessage], window_size: timedelta) -> None
summary: Non-overlapping time windows where hop_size equals window_size.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.application import TumblingWindow

# Usage example
app = TumblingWindow()
